title: Trackea Macros en 3 Segundos
setting: Dark premium kitchen environment with matte black surfaces, consistent violet ambient glow from background LEDs, warm overhead spotlight, shallow depth of field, same camera height and framing throughout

scenes.prompt: Frustrated person scrolling through endless food database on phone in dimly lit kitchen, overwhelmed expression, moody lighting with violet shadows, cinematic close-up, 9:16 vertical
scenes.voiceover: Sigues buscando cada alimento uno a uno en tu app de calorias?

scenes.prompt: Hand holding phone taking photo of colorful Spanish meal with tortilla espanola and salad on dark plate, camera flash, premium dark kitchen, violet ambient glow, 9:16 vertical
scenes.voiceover: Con Cals2Gains, solo haz una foto de tu plato.

scenes.prompt: Sleek dark-themed app interface showing AI analyzing food with glowing scan lines, macro breakdown with animated numbers, violet and coral UI accents, futuristic holographic effect, 9:16 vertical
scenes.voiceover: Nuestra IA identifica cada ingrediente, estima porciones y calcula macros exactos.

scenes.prompt: Split screen comparison: left side timer 15 minutes frustrated person, right side 3-second counter happy person, dark premium, violet neon divider, 9:16 vertical
scenes.voiceover: Quince minutos buscando a mano... o tres segundos con IA. Tu decides.

scenes.prompt: Confident person enjoying meal while phone shows tracked macros on dark premium app, warm coral lighting, relaxed lifestyle, shallow depth of field, 9:16 vertical
scenes.voiceover: Descarga Cals2Gains gratis. Link en bio. Tus macros en tres segundos.
